signal.title: EBay rejects $56bn GameStop bid as ‘neither credible nor attractive’
signal.reasoning: high-credibility source, strong historical pattern match.

notes: EBay formally rejected the 6bn GameStop bid as 'neither credible nor attractive' citing financing concerns. Predicted forced covering and borrow fee spike did not materialize.
